hero.title: Turn Text Into
hero.description: Generate hilarious memes from any text in seconds. Support for 110+ languages, unlimited templates, and AI-powered creativity.

aiGeneration.title: AI Text to Meme
aiGeneration.description: Type any text and watch AI generate 8 unique meme variations instantly. No design skills needed.

multilingual.title: 110+ Languages
multilingual.description: Create memes in your native language. Our AI understands context across 110+ languages.

templates.title: Unlimited Templates
templates.description: Access thousands of trending templates or upload your own. Always fresh, always relevant.

video.title: Video Memes
video.description: Create animated GIF and video memes with perfect timing and captions.

api.title: API Access
api.description: Integrate meme generation into your apps, bots, and workflows with our powerful API.

custom.title: Custom Branding
custom.description: Add your logo and watermark. Perfect for social media managers and brands.

step1.title: Enter Your Text
step1.description: Type any text, phrase, or idea you want to turn into a meme.

step2.title: AI Magic
step2.description: Our AI analyzes your text and generates 8 perfectly matched meme variations.

step3.title: Share & Go Viral
step3.description: Download or share directly to social media. Watch the likes roll in.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you need more power

footer.tagline: Making the internet funnier, one meme at a time.
